channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: India Visit Was Among Trump's Best Bilateral Tours: Ex-US Diplomat To NDTV

media:content.media:description: Juster also credited Prime Minister Narendra Modi with improving India's business climate

item.description: Looking ahead to a possible visit by President Donald Trump to India next year, Juster recalled Trump's previous visit as one of the highlights of his presidency.
item.content:encoded: Looking ahead to a possible visit by President Donald Trump to India next year, Juster recalled Trump's previous visit as one of the highlights of his presidency.

item.title: Exiled Chinese Tycoon Jailed 30 Years In US For $1 Billion Fraud

media:content.media:description: Guo, also known as Guo Wengui, was sentenced Monday in federal court in Manhattan

item.description: Exiled Chinese tycoon Miles Guo sentenced to 30 years in US prison for a $1B fraud scheme, funding a lavish lifestyle of superyachts and penthouses.
item.content:encoded: Exiled Chinese tycoon Miles Guo sentenced to 30 years in US prison for a $1B fraud scheme, funding a lavish lifestyle of superyachts and penthouses.

item.title: Ahead Of 250th Independence Day, Trump Posts Artwork With George Washington

media:content.media:description: The digitally created artwork places Trump alongside George Washington

item.description: Trump shared the image on his social media platform ahead of the United States' 250th Independence Day celebrations, which will be marked on July 4.
item.content:encoded: Trump shared the image on his social media platform ahead of the United States' 250th Independence Day celebrations, which will be marked on July 4.

item.title: Trump Should Be Invited As Republic Day Guest: US-India Forum Head To NDTV

media:content.media:description: Aghi also dismissed suggestions that ties between Trump and Prime Minister Narendra Modi had weakened.

item.description: On the proposed India-US trade agreement, Mukesh Aghi, President and CEO of the US-India Strategic Partnership Forum, said negotiators had narrowed differences substantially, with only a few issues remaining.
item.content:encoded: On the proposed India-US trade agreement, Mukesh Aghi, President and CEO of the US-India Strategic Partnership Forum, said negotiators had narrowed differences substantially, with only a few issues remaining.

item.title: "He'll Be Up, He's Like Me": When Trump Wanted To Call PM Modi At 6 AM

media:content.media:description: Gor said the India-US partnership was stronger than critics acknowledged

item.description: US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor said negotiators from both countries were in the final stages of concluding the long-awaited bilateral trade agreement.
item.content:encoded: US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor said negotiators from both countries were in the final stages of concluding the long-awaited bilateral trade agreement.

item.title: How One Morning In Siberia Changed What Humanity Knows About Space

media:content.media:description: The Tunguska event has over the years helped reshape how governments think about threats from space

item.description: Around 7:15 am on June 30 in 1908, during the reign of Tsar Nicholas II, an object from space entered Earth's atmosphere over Siberia. And it changed science forever.
item.content:encoded: Around 7:15 am on June 30 in 1908, during the reign of Tsar Nicholas II, an object from space entered Earth's atmosphere over Siberia. And it changed science forever.

item.title: Trump's Tariff Eroded India's Trust In US: Indian-American Lawmaker To NDTV

media:content.media:description: Khanna said it was possible to oppose Beijing without targeting Chinese Americans

item.description: Asked how the situation could be fixed, Ro Khanna said, "We need new leadership. The more Democrats elected, the more it gets fixed."
item.content:encoded: Asked how the situation could be fixed, Ro Khanna said, "We need new leadership. The more Democrats elected, the more it gets fixed."

item.title: How Long Can People Stay Alive Trapped In Rubble After An Earthquake?

media:content.media:description: The best practices for survival during an earthquake depend on where you are in the world

item.description: Trapped after an earthquake, survival depends on injuries, weather, water and air. Experts reveal how victims have endured days under rubble.
item.content:encoded: Trapped after an earthquake, survival depends on injuries, weather, water and air. Experts reveal how victims have endured days under rubble.

item.title: Warren Buffett Pauses Gates Foundation Donations Over Jeffrey Epstein Review

media:content.media:description: Buffett is delaying his donation decision until later in the year

item.description: Warren Buffett has paused donations to the Gates Foundation pending an external review regarding the organization's ties to Jeffrey Epstein.
item.content:encoded: Warren Buffett has paused donations to the Gates Foundation pending an external review regarding the organization's ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: "Enough With The Lecture": Paris Deputy Mayor Slams Americans Mocking France's Lack Of AC

media:content.media:description: France has traditionally been reluctant to embrace air conditioning

item.description: Paris Deputy Mayor Audrey Pulvar argued that the US bears a significant share of the responsibility for the climate crisis driving such extreme weather.
item.content:encoded: Paris Deputy Mayor Audrey Pulvar argued that the US bears a significant share of the responsibility for the climate crisis driving such extreme weather.

item.title: 'If Countries Were Stocks, I'd Be Buying India': US Senator To NDTV

media:content.media:description: The senator also backed easier movement of skilled professionals and students between India and US

item.description: The Montana senator also praised President Donald Trump's approach to India, saying the administration remained committed to strengthening ties with Prime Minister Narendra Modi.
item.content:encoded: The Montana senator also praised President Donald Trump's approach to India, saying the administration remained committed to strengthening ties with Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

item.title: India-US Trade Deal In Final Stretch: What We Know So Far

media:content.media:description: Sergio Gor said negotiations were nearing the finish line.

item.description: USISPF President and CEO Mukesh Aghi told NDTV that the remaining differences are relatively narrow but politically significant.
item.content:encoded: USISPF President and CEO Mukesh Aghi told NDTV that the remaining differences are relatively narrow but politically significant.

item.title: WhatsApp Username Feature: What It Is, How It Works, And Why It Matters

media:content.media:description: Users will be able to pick a unique username that others can use to contact them

item.description: The latest update comes as Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah takes charge of Meta's WhatsApp
item.content:encoded: The latest update comes as Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah takes charge of Meta's WhatsApp

item.title: US Man Dies From Heart Attack While Disposing Girlfriend's Body After Murder

media:content.media:description: Man dies of heart attack while disposing girlfriend's body after strangling her in Alabama.

item.description: An American man fatally strangles his girlfriend but later dies of a heart attack while disposing of her body.
item.content:encoded: An American man fatally strangles his girlfriend but later dies of a heart attack while disposing of her body.

item.title: 'India's Engineering Talent Give It AI Advantage Over China,' Top US Official Tells NDTV

media:content.media:description: Helberg's remarks come as India and the United States are expanding cooperation in AI

item.description: Asked how Washington and New Delhi could work together amid growing strategic competition with China, Helberg said the focus should be on building a positive technology partnership rather than simply competing with Beijing.
item.content:encoded: Asked how Washington and New Delhi could work together amid growing strategic competition with China, Helberg said the focus should be on building a positive technology partnership rather than simply competing with Beijing.

item.title: 'We'll Cut Off Hands That...': Pakistan's Unprovoked Threat Over Indus Waters

media:content.media:description: Malik said that elsewhere in the world, water continued to flow even in the absence of a treaty

item.description: New Delhi had placed the Indus Waters Treaty in abeyance following a deadly cross-border terrorist strike in Jammu and Kashmir's Pahalgam last year that killed 26 civilians.
item.content:encoded: New Delhi had placed the Indus Waters Treaty in abeyance following a deadly cross-border terrorist strike in Jammu and Kashmir's Pahalgam last year that killed 26 civilians.

item.title: Doctors Suspected Brain Cancer In Spanish Man With Chronic Headaches. Scans Revealed Otherwise

media:content.media:description: Fortunately, the Spanish patient responded well to treatment with the antiparasitic drugs.

item.description: Multiple brain scans were required to find the true culprit behind the man's worsening headaches.
item.content:encoded: Multiple brain scans were required to find the true culprit behind the man's worsening headaches.

item.title: He Promised 15% Returns With Zero Risk. It Was A $60 Million Scam

media:content.media:description: Paul Regan pleaded guilty in March and is expected to be sentenced in August.

item.description: Paul Regan, a US man, is accused of orchestrating a Ponzi scheme that raised more than $60 million from over 300 investors
item.content:encoded: Paul Regan, a US man, is accused of orchestrating a Ponzi scheme that raised more than $60 million from over 300 investors

item.title: Ford Rehires 350 Human Engineers After AI Fails To Match Human Expertise

media:content.media:description: Ford reverses AI reliance, bringing back engineers for vehicle quality.

item.description: Ford has admitted to rehiring 350 veteran engineers after artificial intelligence (AI) failed to match veteran skills in quality checks.
item.content:encoded: Ford has admitted to rehiring 350 veteran engineers after artificial intelligence (AI) failed to match veteran skills in quality checks.

item.title: "Blatant Act Of Aggression": India Slams Pak For Strikes In Afghanistan

media:content.media:description: Pakistan's information minister said air and ground operations killed 29 militants

item.description: Pakistan launched its deadliest attack on Afghanistan in months, with Islamabad saying on Monday it killed dozens of militants as the Afghan government reported civilian casualties.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan launched its deadliest attack on Afghanistan in months, with Islamabad saying on Monday it killed dozens of militants as the Afghan government reported civilian casualties.
